description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the golang:1.13-stretch Docker image and defines a single test stage. Add a unit_tests job in the test stage that first runs a before_script to write a stub Go file (keys_stub.go) with a placeholder getMyKeys function, then executes go test -race, and finally runs an after_script to remove the generated keys_stub.go file. No services, caches, artifacts, or special rules are required.
